parameters.apprise_url_plus: mailgun://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.user_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.host_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.apikey_secret }} }/
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Mailgun destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise mailgun:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a Mailgun Messages API form body and post it to api.mailgun.net (no Apprise).
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to your Mailgun sending domain (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Mailgun destinations, direct

apikey_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Mailgun apikey

host_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Mailgun host

user_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Mailgun user
